text.message: Is there any reason for this game to last one more hour?
All take 3 hours on their turn
I havent done anything the last 15 min
Same here after our lost my city and finally, I have one again
Well, and then suddenly red appears
Oh no, I was not supposed to build that settlements down south. It was supposed to be a road and I just saw my mistake now. Well sometimes a man can be unlucky.
